name: smruti-cortex
description: SmrutiCortex — Everything-like instant browser history search (MV3).
author: dhruvinrsoni

scripts.build: node ./scripts/sync-version.mjs && rimraf dist && tsc --project tsconfig.json && node ./scripts/copy-static.mjs && node ./scripts/esbuild-dev.mjs
scripts.build:prod: node ./scripts/sync-version.mjs && rimraf dist && tsc --project tsconfig.json && node ./scripts/copy-static.mjs && node ./scripts/esbuild-prod.mjs
scripts.test:e2e: npm run build:prod && npx playwright test
scripts.preversion: node -e "const{execSync:e}=require('child_process');if(e('git status --porcelain',{encoding:'utf-8'}).trim()){console.error('Working tree not clean. Commit or stash first.');process.exit(1)}"
scripts.postversion: node -e "console.log('Version bumped and synced. Run npm run release:* for full release pipeline.')"
